tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across the nimistu register of Estonian companies, people and trademarks. Returns matches each with a stable `id` (pass to `fetch`, `get_company` or `get_person`) and a canonical nimistu.ee URL. Use this first to locate an entity by name or registry code.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a record by the `id` returned from `search` (e.g. 'company:10000018', 'person:18345', 'trademark:123', 'emtak:47811'). Returns the record text, its canonical nimistu.ee URL and metadata.

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Full profile of an Estonian company by its registry code: status, address, activity (EMTAK), VAT, employees, financials, tax debt, sanctions, board members, shareholders, supervisory board, foreign parent, subsidiaries and trademarks.

tools.name: get_person
tools.description: Profile of a person in the Estonian business register: birth year, sanctions, and all companies they are connected to (board member, shareholder, etc.), current and past. Look the person up with `search` first to get their id.

tools.name: lookup_emtak
tools.description: EMTAK is the Estonian classification of economic activities. Pass `code` for details + stats on one activity, or `query` to search activities by Estonian name. Returns the code, ET/EN name and the count of active companies.

tools.name: companies_by_emtak
tools.description: List active Estonian companies whose primary activity is a given EMTAK code, optionally filtered by county. Use `lookup_emtak` to find the code first.

tools.name: whats_new_today
tools.description: A summary of recent activity: a daily narrative of notable changes plus counts of newly registered companies (last few working days), broken down by legal form, county and activity, with a sample of the newest companies.

tools.name: search_trademarks
tools.description: Search Estonian-linked trademarks (EUIPO + Estonian Patent Office) by their verbal element. Returns each mark with its status and the owning company.

tools.name: rankings
tools.description: Curated leaderboards from the nimistu data: top taxpayers, revenue, profit, employers, tax debtors, grant recipients, procurement winners, people holding the most board seats, audit firms, recipients of state payments, VAT groups, top corporate shareholders, and members of Parliament (Riigikogu) or

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "lookup_emtak" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "companies_by_emtak" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.
